titleStmt.title: SII 15.148: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 148. (B.K. No. 56 of 1929-30.) PĪRĀPUR, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the Lakshmīdēvi temple.
This is dated the 3rd regnal year of the king, Saumya, corresponding to 1189-90 A.D. Other details are not given.

It registers a gift of land to the god Śiriyamēśvara installed by Mahāpradhāna, Dēsiya-daṇḍanāyaka, Hiriya heggaḍe Nannarasa. The gift was made with the approval of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Virupadēva by Mahāpradhāna, Magara-Murāri Lammidēva-nāyaka (i.e. Lakshmīdēva-daṇḍanāyaka) after laving the feet of Kannaguru. Another gift was made to the deity by the Five Hundred.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ pratā
pacakrava¨rtti bhilamadēvava¨rṣada 3 neya sau
mya saṁvuvatsaradaṁdu śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ ma
garamurāri lammidēvanāyakaru svasti
śrī manmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ virupadēvarasaranu
matadiṁ śrīmanmahāpradhāna dēsiya daṁḍanā
yakaṁ hiriya heggaḍe nannarasaru tāvu māḍisida
śiriyamēsvaradēvara poje punaśkāra nivēdya
naḍasuvaṁtāgi kaṁnnagurugaḷige kālaṁ toḷa
du dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi sa¨rvvanama syavāgi biThe letter � is written below the line.
ṭṭa keyi madavāḷigeya haḷḷiya holadalu Ū
riṁ paḍuvalu ji¨rṇnōdharada keyiṁ teṁkalu basadiya ga
ḍiṁbada 32 ghaḷeyalu ma 6 mane magilaṁ baḍagaṇa goṁṭe
lu cadurasa 19 keyi Ā dēvara muṁdaṇa tōṁṭa maṭa
doḷage Āyinū¨rvvaru biṭṭa dēvamāna koṭṭalli māna 1 koṁ
ḍalli māna 1 soṭigeṇne .
Digital edition of SII 15.148 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
